nodes.label: 00-init-databases.sql

nodes.label: 04-ads.sql
nodes.summary: Creates 8 ADS dashboard result tables

nodes.label: 05-mysql-ads.sql
nodes.summary: MySQL DDL: 8 ads_* dashboard tables + ads_column_dict (mirrors Hive phone_ads)

nodes.label: OdsToDwdJob

nodes.label: PipelineJob
nodes.summary: Spark batch orchestrator: runs raw->ods->dwd->dws->ads->mysql + column-dict sequentially

nodes.summary: Spark batch: MSCK REPAIR ods_phone_sales to pick up HDFS parquet partitions
